name: aiworkbench
postCreateCommand: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && grep -q '[profile aiworkbench]' /root/.aws/config 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARNING: [profile aiworkbench] not found in ~/.aws/config — add it (see .devcontainer/aws-config.example) then rebuild'
postStartCommand: aws sts get-caller-identity --profile aiworkbench 2>/dev/null || aws sso login --profile aiworkbench; claude
